channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LUPIN] Lupin Receives Approval for Dapagliflozin Tablets in the US
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Global pharma major Lupin Limited has announced that it has received approval from the US Food and Drug Administration (US FDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg. The US FDA has approved Lupin’s Dapagliflozin Tablets as bioequivalent to Farxiga® for the indications in the approved labeling. Lupin Limited, headquartered in Mumbai, India, is a global pharmaceutical leader with products distributed in over 100 markets. The company specializes in pharmaceutical products, including branded and generic formulations, complex generics, biotechnology products, and active pharmaceutical ingredients.

  • Lupin Limited receives approval from the US FDA for Dapagliflozin Tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg.
  • The approved Dapagliflozin Tablets are found to be bioequivalent to Farxiga®.
  • Lupin Limited is a global pharmaceutical leader with products in over 100 markets.
  • The company specializes in various pharmaceutical products, including branded and generic formulations, complex generics, biotechnology products, and active pharmaceutical ingredients.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUPIN LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [INDHOTEL] IHCL accelerates portfolio expansion, reaches 628 hotels with 373 in operations and 255 in pipeline
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL) continues its growth momentum reaching a portfolio of 628 hotels, with an industry-leading pipeline of 255 hotels. The company demonstrated organic growth across its brandscape with 19 signings and opened 30+ hotels this fiscal year. Through acquisitions, IHCL added over 100 operating hotels, taking the total operating hotels to 373.

  • IHCL's portfolio reached 628 hotels with a pipeline of 255 hotels
  • The company demonstrated organic growth with 19 signings across brands
  • IHCL opened 30+ hotels this fiscal year in various locations
  • Acquisitions added over 100 operating hotels, taking the total operating hotels to 373

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN HOTELS CO.LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [LEMONTREE] CCI Grants Approval for Lemon Tree Hotels' Acquisition of Fleur Hotels Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd. has announced that the Competition Commission of India (CCI) has granted its approval for the acquisition of certain equity shares of Fleur Hotels Limited by Coastal Cedar Investments BV. The approval also covers the internal restructuring of the Company group through amalgamation and demerger. The detailed order from the CCI is still awaited. This approval is a significant milestone towards the completion of the proposed transactions as previously disclosed.

  • Competition Commission of India has granted approval for Lemon Tree Hotels' acquisition of Fleur Hotels Limited shares
  • Coastal Cedar Investments BV is involved in the acquisition
  • The approval also covers the internal restructuring of the Company group through amalgamation and demerger
  • The detailed order from the CCI is still awaited
  • This approval marks a significant milestone towards the completion of the proposed transactions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lemon Tree Hotels Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [M&M] Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Transfers Shares to Stock Option Grantees
item.description:
Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd has transferred shares to stock option grantees on 7th April 2026, following the exercise of stock options granted under the Company’s Employees’ Stock Option Scheme. The transfer involves 20,516 equity shares to 49 grantees. The list of grantees and the number of shares transferred to each is provided in the annexure.

  • Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd transfers shares to 49 stock option grantees
  • 20,516 equity shares transferred
  • Transfer follows the exercise of stock options under the Company’s Employees’ Stock Option Scheme
  • Largest transfer is 1500 shares to Sasidhar Kanigelpula
  • Smallest transfer is 25 shares to Kartik Ramasubramanian

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD. | Category: Stock Option Grantees

item.title: [INTENTECH] Promoters of Intense Technologies Ltd Confirm No Encumbrance of Shares as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under regulation 31(4) of SEBI(SAST)Regulations, promoters of Intense Technologies Ltd, namely Krishna Shastri Chidella, Tikam Sujan, and Uma Maheswari Chidella, along with Anisha Chidella as a part of the promoter group, have declared holding 11,05,478 shares of the company as of March 31, 2026. They confirmed that no encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, was made during the financial year ended on March 31, 2026. Furthermore, no shares of the company were encumbered or pledged by them as of the same date.

  • Promoters of Intense Technologies Ltd declare holding 11,05,478 shares as of March 31, 2026
  • No encumbrance of shares made during the financial year ended on March 31, 2026
  • No shares of the company encumbered or pledged by promoters as of March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTENSE TECHNOLOGIES LTD.-$ | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [PROZONINTU] Prozone Realty Ltd Successfully Acquires Majority Stakes in Empire, Alliance, and Hagwood
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prozone Realty Ltd has completed the acquisition of equity shares in Empire Mall Private Limited, Alliance Mall Developers Co. Private Limited (Coimbatore), and Hagwood Commercial and Developers Private Limited. The company, through its subsidiaries Kruti Realtors and Developers Private Limited and Prozone Liberty International Limited, has acquired 100% shareholding in these entities. The post-acquisition shareholding percentages are as follows: Empire - 34.71%, Alliance - 61.50%, and Hagwood - 61.50%.

  • Prozone Realty Ltd has successfully completed the acquisition of equity shares in Empire, Alliance, and Hagwood.
  • The acquisition was made through the company's subsidiaries Kruti Realtors and Developers Private Limited and Prozone Liberty International Limited.
  • The company now holds 100% shareholding in Empire, Alliance, and Hagwood.
  • The post-acquisition shareholding percentages are as follows: Empire - 34.71%, Alliance - 61.50%, and Hagwood - 61.50%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prozone Intu Properties Limited | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PRABHA] Prabha Energy Ltd Approves Allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares in Rights Issue
item.description:
Prabha Energy Ltd has approved the allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares of face value of Rs. 1/- each on Rights Basis to the Eligible Equity Shareholders at an issue price of Rs. 144/- per Rights Equity Share. The balance amount shall be payable on subsequent two calls. The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company has been modified accordingly. The Rights issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026, from 08:10 pm to 08:30 pm.

  • Prabha Energy Ltd has approved the allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares.
  • The issue price is Rs. 144/- per Rights Equity Share with a premium of Rs. 143/- per Rights Equity Share.
  • The balance amount shall be payable on subsequent two calls.
  • The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company has been modified.
  • The Rights issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prabha Energy Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PRABHA] Prabha Energy Ltd Approves Allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares in Rights Issue
item.description:
Prabha Energy Ltd has announced the approval of allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares in its Rights Issue. The allotment is at an issue price of Rs. 144/- per Rights Equity Share, which includes a premium of Rs. 143/- per Rights Equity Share. The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company will be modified accordingly. The Rights Issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026, and the decision was made in accordance with the Basis of Allotment finalized in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and approved by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

  • Prabha Energy Ltd approves the allotment of 96,67,258 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares in its Rights Issue.
  • The allotment is at an issue price of Rs. 144/- per Rights Equity Share, including a premium of Rs. 143/- per Rights Equity Share.
  • The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company will be modified accordingly.
  • The Rights Issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026.
  • The decision was made in accordance with the Basis of Allotment finalized in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and approved by the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prabha Energy Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ABCAPITAL] Aditya Birla Capital Subsidiary Raises INR 2,750 Crores from Advent International
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aditya Birla Capital Limited has announced that its subsidiary, Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited, has raised INR 2,750 Crore of growth capital from Indriya Limited, an entity of Advent International L.P. This investment was initially approved by the Board of Directors of Aditya Birla Capital Limited on 03 February 2026, and has now received approval from the Competition Commission of India. The transaction is in line with the Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015.

  • Aditya Birla Housing Finance Limited raises INR 2,750 Crore from Advent International
  • The investment was initially approved by the Board of Directors of Aditya Birla Capital Limited on 03 February 2026
  • The Competition Commission of India has granted its approval for the transaction
  • The transaction is in accordance with the Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aditya Birla Capital Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ASHIANA] Ashiana Housing Ltd. Achieves Highest Ever Annual Sales of INR 2421.47 Crores in FY’26
item.description:
Ashiana Housing Ltd. has reported a robust operational performance for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2026. The company booked a total area of 26.73 lakhs sq. ft. in Q4 FY’26, with a value of area sold at INR 2,421.13 crores, marking the highest ever annual sales value. The sales value of the area booked in ‘Senior Living’ stood at INR 570.15 crores, also the highest ever recorded. A total of 665 units were booked in Q4 FY’26, with 849 units launched in the same quarter. The higher sales in Q4 FY’26 can be attributed to the launch of Aaroham Phase-I and Phase-II in Gurugram. Handover has commenced for Ashiana Shubham Phase-V in Chennai and Ashiana Ekansh Phase -II in Jaipur.

  • Highest ever annual sales value of INR 2421.47 crores in FY’26
  • Sales value of Senior Living stood at INR 570.15 crores, highest ever recorded
  • 665 units booked in Q4 FY’26, 849 units launched in the same quarter
  • Higher sales in Q4 FY’26 primarily due to launch of Aaroham Phase-I and Phase-II in Gurugram
  • Handover commenced for Ashiana Shubham Phase-V in Chennai and Ashiana Ekansh Phase -II in Jaipur

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHIANA HOUSING LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result
